authority_boundary: formalism-tests produces receipts. Site publishes public status and links. Site must not become the authority for receipts.

current_status.workstream: Admissibility Wiki + Public Proof Surface Sync
current_status.summary: The public Site mirrors current proof posture while the Admissibility Wiki maintains public vocabulary, governance terms, and proof-path explanations.
current_status.current_public_stage: Stage 31 / StegVerse-001 proof mirror plus StegVerse-002 production-candidate mirror
current_status.historical_transition_table_stage: Stage 10 release-candidate data is preserved as transition-table history and must not be read as the only current admissibility status.

repositories.name: StegVerse-Labs/Site
repositories.boundary: Publishes status, pages, and public mirrors; does not generate receipts.

repositories.name: StegVerse-Labs/admissibility-wiki
repositories.role: public vocabulary, glossary, ontology, and proof-path explanation layer
repositories.boundary: Defines and documents vocabulary; does not replace executable proof authority.

repositories.name: Data-Continuation/formalism-tests
repositories.boundary: Produces executable formalism results and receipts.

non_claims: The Admissibility Wiki does not replace executable formalism tests.
A public page is not proof of admissibility by itself.
Stage 10 transition-table release-candidate data is historical unless explicitly labeled current by a newer status artifact.
next_actions: Add Admissibility-Wiki AI Entity review posture page.
Add page governance template requiring proposal, decision, replay, and reconstruction links.
Version or preserve historical Stage 10 transition-table data separately from current Stage 31 / SV-002 status.
